char_status: Director of 狩灵协会6科, Elder twin of 花坂 family
char_overview: 色彩阶 titled 靛蓝封禁, director of 狩灵协会6科. Guardian of 天丛云剑, confined to 狩灵协会 grounds.
char_looks: Short black hair. Blue, calm as the ocean eyes. Black leather jacket with blue straps, white shirt, black trousers, combat boots. 天丛云剑, divine greatsword 1.4m. No 恶灵 has survived a direct attack. Sealed in special sheath. Carries throwing knives for regular combat.
char_flaws: Overemphasizes responsibility, refuses to share the sword's burden.
char_abilities: 花坂血统: No 灵力 or 灵视. Physical capabilities and mental resilience greatly enhanced.
char_mission: Guard 天丛云剑. Protect Fukuoka from 扭曲 as head of 狩灵协会6科.

char_relationships.花坂 枫: Father. Trained under him, then ended his rampage. Carries that weight in every moment with 天丛云剑.
char_relationships.花坂 晴子: Mother. Knew and forgave him. She never spoke of that night again, which weighs on him more than any words could.
char_relationships.千乐: Younger brother. Never asked about that night. Suspects he knows more than he shows. Their silence is enough. Respects the life he built away from the 狩灵协会.
char_relationships.百合子: Youngest sister. He tried hardest to shield her from the truth. She found it anyway. She stopped asking about Father, and that cuts deeper than if she had kept asking.
